question_uuid.description: UUID of the question being answered

response_type.description: Type of response - matches the question's response_type from GET

text_response.description: Text response (required when response_type is text)

file_response.description: Data URL with base64-encoded file (e.g., "data:image/png;base64,..."). Required when response_type is document.

file_name.description: Original filename with extension (e.g., "document.pdf"). Used for document uploads.
